Video.summary: Les Brown, with cameo appearances by Bob Proctor, David Meltzer, Mary Morrissey and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Les Brown

Video.summary: Robert shares the chain of events that inspired him to devote his life to volunteerism and how this can bring deeper meaning to your life and soul too.
Video.title: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Image.alt: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Video.summary: Ask the Experts with Dr. Harlan Selesnick, Cavities with Dr. Jose Blanco
Video.title: Smart Life S1E24

Video.summary: Blaine Bartlett, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett

Video.summary: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Aptivio

Video.summary: In the premiere episode of Fund Tank, viewers are introduced to Charlie Cimitile, an enterprising entrepreneur with a passion for the burgeoning cannabis industry. With a background in medical device sales, Charlie shares his journey of starting Day 1 Distro, an ancillary cannabis distribution company on the East Coast. Facing financial challenges and a desire for rapid growth, Charlie pitches his business to a panel of investors, laying out his vision for expanding his product offerings and capturing a larger market share.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Day 1 Distro

Video.summary: Arielle discusses her book “Turn Your Mate Into Your SoulMate” and shares why everyone needs to read this if they want a deep fulfilling relationship.
Video.title: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Image.alt: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Video.summary: Starring DAVID MELTZER, and with special cameo appearance by boxing champion, Sugar Ray Leonard.
Video.title: World’s Greatest Motivators David Meltzer

Video.summary: Mary Morrissey, with cameo appearances by Les Brown, David Meltzer, Bob Proctor and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Mary Morrissey

Video.summary: Jack Canfield, with cameo appearance by David Meltzer, interviewer.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Jack Canfield

Video.summary: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Video.summary: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Video.summary: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Video.summary: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Marci Shimoff.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Marci Shimoff

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Laura Kunces and Cory Greenberg on the topic of Human Powered Health
Video.title: The Aware Show - Human Powered Health

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Human Powered Health
The Aware Show - Human Powered Health
The Aware Show - Human Powered Health

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Lisa Miller.

The Aware Show - Dr. Lisa Miller
The Aware Show - Dr. Lisa Miller

Video.summary: Ask the Expert Segment with Dr. Ileana Perez-Quintairos, An Alternative to Facelift with Dr. John Martin, What is Alzheimer's? with Michael Pearson, Alzheimer's Association
Video.title: Smart Life S1E20

Video.summary: Eating Healthy on a Budget with Natalie Castro, Robotic Surgery for Fertility with Dr. Armando Hernandez-Rey
Video.title: Smart Life S1E21

Video.summary: Recovery After Surgery with Matt Pack, Fitness Instructor, Pilates Reformer with Ginelle Ruffa
Video.title: Smart Life S1E22

Video.summary: Importance of Wellness Visits with Dr. Deepa Sharma, ing and Self-Defense with Jerome Turner, Meditation with Leslie Glickman, Yoga Instructor
Video.title: Smart Life S1E23

Video.summary: Lolasana is a challenging position that offers a unique opportunity to experience balance and equanimity in both the body and mind.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 20 Equanimity Lolasana

Video.summary: For day 21 of our challenge we will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 21 Unity Pigeon

Video.summary: Today's posture is Bakasana, a powerful arm balance that will help you find that energy in the arms, the core and the entire body.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 22 Energy Bakasana

Video.summary: Day 23 is all about love. Start practice by tuning into breath and body, bringing a special attention to the heartspace. Take a moment for feeling into the vibration of the heart, welcoming a feeling of receptivity. Warm yourself up as Kino brings extra attention to opening the chest and front body. Next we segue into finding and loving your particular expression of Gomukhasana, the cow facing posture. Remember that the cow is a sacred symbol of giving and love as you feel into the postures heart opening effects.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 23 Love Gomukhasana

Video.summary: Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker is a new series that shows you what you're really worth. Shawn is confident he could pluck anyone - no matter their background or experience - and turn them into a 7-figure earner...IF, they have the right attitude and drive. This series is about Shawn selecting who he will mentor and teach to reach a level of success they never thought possible. Welcome to the toughest job interview of your life. In this episode, Shawn meets the contestants and immediately finds out who's actually willing to fight for the life they want.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight

Video.summary: Shawn only wants folks who are willing to be honest about their struggles because it shows you can be fearless. Everyone deserves a happy life...but he can only help you if you're ready to take a chance on yourself. In this episode, the candidates have to sell themselves. They have to tell Shawn their story because he wants to know how you got stuck...but more importantly, they have to convince him they won’t give up...no matter how hard it is to hang on, or take a leap of faith.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions

Video.summary: The rise of guru Bhagwan and his model commune in Poona and oregon in the 1970s & 1980s told by his former close disciples, his personal secretary and bodyguard. A spiritual journey to the depths and shallows of the human soul.
Video.title: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD

Image.alt: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
